title: Doublejump
description: Adds a vanilla-friendly doublejump to minecraft
body:
# Double Jump

## Features
- Double jump by pressing jump a second time in the air
- Cloud particle burst on every jump
- Sound changes based on your boot material (leather, chainmail, iron, gold, diamond, netherite)
- Costs 3 hunger bars per jump
- 10-second cooldown shown live on the action bar
- Momentum follows your look direction
- Configurable launch power (horizontal and vertical separately)

## Server Opt-In
The client mod is completely inert on vanilla servers. Double jump only activates when the server has the mod installed and has it enabled.

## Admin Commands
*Requires op level 2*

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/doublejump enable` | Enable double jump |
| `/doublejump disable` | Disable double jump |
| `/doublejump cooldown <seconds>` | Set cooldown (1–300) |
| `/doublejump hunger <bars>` | Set hunger cost (0–10) |
| `/doublejump nether allow|deny` | Toggle double jump in the Nether |
| `/doublejump launch horizontal <value>` | Set horizontal launch power (0.1–3.0) |
| `/doublejump launch vertical <value>` | Set vertical launch power (0.1–3.0) |
| `/doublejump grant <player>` | Restore double jump for a player |
| `/doublejump revoke <player>` | Remove double jump from a player |
| `/doublejump status` | Show current settings |
| `/doublejump reload` | Reload config from disk |

## Requirements
- Minecraft 26.1.2
- Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
- Fabric API 0.148.0+26.1.2
